subject: [PATCH v5 6/9] mm: list_lru: introduce caller locking for additions and deletions

2026-05-27.patch_summary: This patch introduces caller locking for additions and deletions in the list_lru API. It provides normal and irqsafe locking primitives as well as caller-locked variants of the addition and deletion functions to allow callers to keep auxiliary state synchronized with the LRU state. This is necessary because some users, such as the THP shrinker, require this synchronization to maintain consistency. The patch adds new locking functions and modifies existing ones to support this feature.
